prerequisites: An Adjust account with access to the Adjust dashboard and the report service (reporting) API.

An Adjust API token (api_token). Find it in the Adjust dashboard under Account settings, My profile tab, in the API Token field under User Details. If SSO is configured, the API token is not shown in the dashboard, so request it from your Adjust representative or support@adjust.com.
A start date for replication (ingest_start) in YYYY-MM-DD format (UTC assumed).
At least one metric (metrics) to query and at least one dimension (dimensions) to group metrics by.

authMethods.name: API token (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with your Adjust API token, supplied via the connector's required api_token secret field. The Adjust report service API uses bearer token authentication, sending the token in the HTTP Authorization header as 'Authorization: Bearer <api_token>'. Retrieve or reset the token from Account settings, My profile in the Adjust dashboard; resetting it invalidates the previous token.

setupSteps.title: Obtain your Adjust API token
setupSteps.body: Sign in to the Adjust dashboard. Select the settings icon in the bottom left corner, choose Account settings, open the My profile tab, and copy the value shown in the API Token field under User Details. If your organization uses SSO, the API token is not available in the dashboard; contact your Adjust representative or support@adjust.com to obtain it.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API token
setupSteps.body: Enter the token in the connector's required api_token field. The connector uses it as a bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <api_token>) when calling the Adjust report service API.

setupSteps.title: Set the replication start date
setupSteps.body: Set ingest_start (required) to a date in YYYY-MM-DD format (UTC is assumed). Data starting from this date is replicated.

setupSteps.title: Choose metrics and dimensions
setupSteps.body: Set metrics (required) to the metrics you want to query and dimensions (required) to the dimensions to group those metrics by. The Adjust report service requires at least one metric per request; dimensions segment metrics into groups (for example by app, campaign, country, or time period). Available metrics can be discovered via the Adjust Filters Data endpoint or the Datascape metrics glossary.

setupSteps.title: Configure optional fields
setupSteps.body: Optionally set additional_metrics to add custom metrics to query (treated as decimal values, discoverable through the Adjust filters data endpoint), and until_today to control the upper bound of the ingestion date range.
